sub_topics.title: Kupandulula Litilicca (Defining Literature)
competences: Kundandamika bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca bwiindene-indene (Explore comprehensive definitions of Literature)

instructional_blocks.hook: Ino nikwanyina zyakuswiilizya akweebela buumi nibwali buti? (Now, what if there was nothing to listen to and entertain life, what would it be like?)
teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kundandamika bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca
Gwasyilizya basicikolo kubambulula bupanduluzi mbubapa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Litilicca yiitwa kuti nzyamumabbuku (Literature is what's in books). Caamba milimo yamizeezo yabantu iibikkidwe mubulembo (It describes people's thoughts expressed in writing). Caamba kuzubulula buumi mumabala akasimpe mabotu (It describes revealing life in beautiful ways). Caamba zyintu zyilembedwe (It describes written things). Ninzila yakubwezelela, kuyobola akupa luzyibo akulikkomaninsya kuzwa kuzyalane lyomwe kuya kuli limbi (It's a way to recall, transmit knowledge and connect generations). Ilajatikizya bulembo buzubulula zyilengwa Leza mbozyiswaangana amaumi aabantu (It includes writing revealing God's creations as they relate to people's lives). Iimimina kutondezya kulimvwa kwabantu muzyooko mobakkala (It helps show people's feelings in their communities). Tacaambi biyo zyintu zyilembedwe zyilikke pele azyeezyo zyaambaulwa amulomo (It doesn't only speak of written things but also those spoken orally).

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kuti basansulule bupanduluzi bomwe-bomwe bwapegwa kweendelanya ambubacimvwa
Gwasyilizya basicikolo kubambulula busansuluzi mbubapa bwaLitilicca
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Detailed analysis of each definition component to understand why Literature encompasses both oral and written forms, how it preserves culture, and how it expresses human experience.

teacher_steps: Ambila basicikolo kuti bapandulule mumajwi aabombo bayeeya kuti Litilicca ninzi
Lulamika bupanduluzi bulubide bupa basicikolo akukulwaizya buluzi
learner_steps: Bapandulule mumajwi aabombo bayeeya kuti Litilicca ninzi
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Litilicca caamba nzila bantu nzyobabelesya kutondezya kulimvwa kwabo kujatikizya zyintu zyicitika mumaumi aabo (Literature describes ways people express their feelings about things happening in their lives and communities).

sub_topics.short_notes: Litilicca caamba nzila bantu nzyobabelesya kutondezya kulimvwa kwabo kujatikizya zyintu zyicitika mumaumi aabo mukulemba zyaano, kukanana, kusobana, kwiimba anzila zyimwi biyo.

vocabulary.definition: Kulanganya cintu cakusininzya kutegwa ucimvwisisisye (To examine carefully)
Kulanga-langa cintu kusola kujana bubotu nokuba bubi (To evaluate)
Kuvwiilana kucitika akati kamuntu waambaula abateelezya (Dialogue)

questions: Basicikolo bakayanda ule bupanduluzi bubimbi bwa Litilicca kuŋanda
Sicikolo omwe-omwe alembe bupanduluzi bwakwe mwini bomwe bwa Litilicca mubbuku lyamilimo
Bayibapemulimo kweendelanya aciiyo

sub_topics.title: Kusalangunya bupanduluzi bwiindene-indene bwa Litilicca

teacher_steps: Kopa basicikolo bupanduluzi bwiindene-indene bwa Litilicca akubulanga-langa kuti mbubuli buzulide kabotu
Banongaule bomwe-bomwe akujana mapenzi abubotu
Gwasyilizya basicikolo ciindi nobanongaula bupanduluzi
learner_steps: Batondezye bupanduluzi mbobayeeya kuti mbobubo bweelela ncobeni kweendelanya azyiyiigwa muciiyo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Critical analysis of multiple definitions to determine correctness and appropriateness.

sub_topics.short_notes: Litilicca ilijisi bupanduluzi bwaandeene-andeene kweendelanya abalembi mbobacimvwa ciiyo eeci.

questions: Basicikolo basale bupanduluzi bomwe kuliboobu bwayiigwa, bamana balembe twaambo ntobayeeya kuti mbobweelede
Basicikolo basale abumwi bupanduluzi mbobayeeya kuti tabuzulide, bamana balembe twaambo ncobayeeyelaboobo

sub_topics.title: Kubamba bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca

teacher_steps: Ambila basicikolo kuti babambe bupanduluzi bwabo bwa Litilicca kweendelanya ambubacimvwa ciiyo eeci
Gwasyilizya basicikolo kubona kuti mubandi weenda kabotu
learner_steps: Basicikolo bamana kulanganya akusalangunya bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca bwiimpene-impene bwapegwa, babambe bupanduluzi bwabo beni kweendelanya ambubacimvwa ciiyo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Students construct their own definitions based on critical analysis of various perspectives on Literature.

sub_topics.short_notes: Ciindi basicikolo nibamana kusalangunya akulanganya bupanduluzi bwaandeene-andeene, balajana luzyibo lujatikizya mizeezo iizwa mubupanduluzi oobu.

questions: Babambe bupanduluzi bumbimbi bwa Litilicca
Kubupanduluzi mbubabamba, basale lembo bayeeya kuti bulizulide kwiinda bumwi
Abalembe twaambo tukkutwa tuzuzikizya kuti bupanduluzi bwabo buleelela ncobeni

sub_topics.title: Litilicca yakumulomo (Oral Literature)

teacher_steps: Ambila basicikolo kucita cimwi cintu (kwiimba, kulabika, kwaana, kusobana, kweema) cijatikizya Litilicca yakumulomo
Ambila basicikolo misyobo ya Litilicca eeyi yaambwa moizulilwa
Belesya nzila zyimbi zyeendelana amutwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Litilicca yakumulomo ndibbala lijisi bupanduluzi bunji lyalo lijatikizya kufwumbwa eeco cimwaigwa amulomo. Eeci ncibeela cipati nkaambo cilatondezya zyakali kucitika kaitanaba Litilicca iilembedwe.

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo mumubandi wakulanganya kutondezya Litilicca yakumulomo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Ijwi libandikwa ndiyandisi. Litilicca yakumulomo kanji-kanji ijatikizya kucita cimwi cintu mbuli kwiimba akuzyana, kutondaika akukwabulana abeebelezya. Ilitolelela kucooko acooko ciibamba akwiibelesya.

teacher_steps: Gwasyilizya basicikolo kutondezya misyobo ya Litilicca yakumulomo
Tondezya basicikolo tubunga twamisyobo ya Litilicca yakumulomo
learner_steps: Babikke misyobo ya Litilicca yakumulomo mutubunga ntubatondezyegwa abayi
instructional_blocks.short_notes: ZYAANO: Stories explaining origins, praising experts, entertaining and teaching. ZYEEMO: Short poems expressing feelings. TUSIMPI/TWAAMBYO: Proverbs with condensed wisdom. TULABI: Riddles requiring critical thinking. NYIMBO: Songs for various purposes. KWAAMBILILA: Prayers to God.

sub_topics.short_notes: Litilicca yakumulomo ilacitwa mumajwi kwiinda mukwaambaula, kwiimba, kwaana, kulabika, kweema, kwaambilila, kusobana azyimwi biyo.

questions: Basicikolo babambe kasobano kakwaambilila
Basicikolo baimbe, beeme nokuba kwaana
Basicikolo bakayobolole twaambyo

sub_topics.title: Litilicca iilembedwe (Written Literature)

teacher_steps: Ambila basicikolo bapandulule Litilicca iilembedwe ncoyaamba
Gwasyilizya basicikolo kululamika bupanduluzi mbubapa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Litilicca iilembedwe yaamba luzyibo lusimbidwe lwalo lutondezya buponi bwabantu. Ijatikizya mabbuku, zyaano, zyeemo, milaso, zyisobano azyimwi.

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo mukutondezya Litilicca iilembedwe
learner_steps: Batondezye Litilicca iilembedwe munzila yiinda kuli yomwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Litilicca iilembedwe ibelesya bulembo kumwaya akuyobola luzyibo kwiinda mumabbuku, miteende, mafooni azyimwi. Eeci cipa kuti kiikkala kwaciindi cilamfwu akumwaigwa kule.

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kwaapaula misyobo ya Litilicca iilembedwe
Gwasyilizya basicikolo kubona kuti bwaapauzi bwacitwa bweelede
instructional_blocks.short_notes: ZYAKULENGELEZYA: Tubbuku (Books), Twaano tufwaafwi (Short stories), Novela (Novels), Zyeemo (Poems), Zyisobano (Dramas). ZYAMASIMPE: Milaso (Prose), Caano cabuponi bwamuntu (Biography), Caano camulembi lwakwe (Autobiography), Caano catunsiya-nsiya (Non-fiction), Malembo aabunsengwe (Creative writing).

sub_topics.short_notes: Litilicca iilembedwe yaamba luzyibo lusimbidwe lwalo lutondezya buponi bwabantu. Ijatikizya mabbuku, zyaano, zyeemo, milaso, zyisobano azyimwi.

questions: Basicikolo balembe caano cabuumi bwabo
Basicikolo batondezye akulemba misyobo ya Litilicca iilembedwe
Basicikolo bakavwuntauzye bube bwa Litilicca iilembedwe bwataambwa

sub_topics.title: Lwiindano akukozyanya kuliko akati ka Litilicca yakumulomo ailembedwe

teacher_steps: Ambila sicikolo omwe kuti ape kaano, amana umbi abale cilembedwe
Ambila basicikolo kuti bape lwiindano luliko kuzwa kukaano kaanwa alimwi acabalwa
learner_steps: Basicikolo bape kukozyanya kuliko kuzwa kukaano kaanwa alimwi acabalwa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: KUKOZYANYA: Both types available to everyone, teach good culture, preserve heritage, unite people, transmit knowledge across generations. They help educate and bring communities together.

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kundandamika lwiindano luliko akati ka litilicca yakumulomo ailembedwe
learner_steps: Bandandamike lwiindano luliko akati ka Litilicca yakumulomo ailembedwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: LWIINDANO: Oral uses voice/mouth while written uses recorded materials. Oral doesn't travel far, written can reach distant places. Oral allows immediate audience feedback, written cannot. Oral can change, written is fixed. Oral can be misheard, written remains constant.

sub_topics.short_notes: Litilicca ili mumisyobo yobilo; yakumulomo ailembedwe.

questions: Basicikolo bakavwuntauzye kukozyanya kumbi kwataambwa kuliko akati ka Litilicca yakumulomo ailembedwe
Basicikolo balembe twaambo tutondezya lwiindano luliko akati ka Litilicca yakumulomo ailembedwe
Basicikolo bavwuntauzye akulemba bubotu bwa Litilicca yakumulomo ailembedwe

sub_topics.title: Milimo ya Litilicca yakumulomo

instructional_blocks.hook: Sena kwiimba, kweema, kuyabila akubala mabbuku kulakonzya kucinca buumi bwa muntu?
teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kundandamika milimo ya Litilicca yakumulomo
Gwasyilizya kubona kuti mulimo wacitwa bweelede
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Functions: Preserving cultural heritage, developing human life, teaching good culture and wisdom, teaching healthy living, helping people think wisely, uniting communities, bringing understanding, finding peace, helping with problems, teaching and preserving daily life.

sub_topics.short_notes: Litilicca yakumulomo ilagwasya kapati mubuumi bwamuntu oonse munzila zyinji.

questions: Basicikolo balembe mbobazyibelesya zyiimbo muzyooko mobakkala
Basicikolo basansulule milimo imbi ya Litilicca yakumulomo yatasansulwa
Basicikolo bazumanikane (debate) kujatikizya mutwe wapegwa azya milimo ya Litilicca yakumulomo

sub_topics.title: Milimo ya Litilicca iilembedwe

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kundandamika milimo ya Litilicca iilembedwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Functions: Uniting people across distances, teaching and knowledge transmission, preserving heritage, revealing life and culture, developing language skills, understanding written materials.

sub_topics.short_notes: Mucibeela eeci, twalanganya milimo ya Litilicca iilembedwe, kundandamika, kusansulula akwiininina busansuluzi bwa Litilicca iilembedwe.

questions: Basicikolo bakalembe milimo imbi ya Litilicca iilembedwe yataambwa
Balembe milimo ya Litilicca iilembedwe mboigwasya mubuponi bwabantu
Bakavwuntauzye Litilicca iilembedwe mboikonzya kugwasya kwaangulula mizeezo kuzwa kukudyaamininwa abamuzwa kule

sub_topics.title: Matalikilo aamilimo ya Litilicca mutunsiya-nsiya

instructional_blocks.hook: Mbubuti zyintu zyicitika muzyooko motukkala mbozyitonkelezya bantu kuti balembe mabbuku, zyaano akwaanza zyeemo nokuba zyiyabilo?
teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kupa bupanduluzi bwamilimo yatunsiya-nsiya (zyiimbo, twaambyo, zyeemo…)
Ambila basicikolo kuti balanganye milimo ya Litilicca mutunsiya-nsiya
instructional_blocks.short_notes: NYIMBO: Songs for various purposes - praising, mourning, celebrating, communicating, prayer. TWAAMBYO: Proverbs teaching wisdom and guiding behavior. ZYAANO: Stories preserving culture and teaching lessons. KWEEMA: Poetry expressing feelings and experiences.

sub_topics.short_notes: Litilicca yakumulomo ijatikizya cibaka cipati naa cibeela camusyobo wa zyaano, nyimbo, zyeemo, twaambyo, tulabi amaambilambali azyimwi zyacaala zyikananwa biya naa kwiimbwa kubelesya jwi lya mulomo.

vocabulary.definition: Kagabba kakabikkwa tubwe tusyoonto kabelesyegwa kwiimba

questions: Basicikolo bajane ciimbo antela caano akutondezya mbociswaangana abuponi bwabantu
Basicikolo baanze zyeemo, kufwula zyiimbo akulemba zyaano kuzwa kuzyilengwa
Kuzumanikana (Debate): Nyimbo zyamazubaano zyanyonganya bukkale mucisi

sub_topics.title: Misyobo Ya Litilicca Yakumulomo (Types of Oral Literature)
competences: Kubandika zyijatikizya misyobo ya Litilicca yakumulomo

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kutondezya misyobo ya Litilicca yakumulomo
Bona kuti bana balemba misyobo yeelede
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Types: ZYEEMO (Poems), TUNYONA MULAKA (Tongue twisters), TWAANO (Stories), TUSIMPI (Proverbs), TULABI (Riddles), NYIMBO (Songs), MADINKU (Chants), TUSANKO (Curses), MANGWININI (Satire).

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo kupandulula misyobo ya Litilicca yakumulomo
Lulamika bwiinguzi butali kabotu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Detailed definitions: ZYEEMO - poems beautifying words in expressive gestures. TUNYONA MULAKA - unclear speech for quick pronunciation practice. TWAANO - stories passed from generation to generation. TUSIMPI - wise words with hidden meaning. TULABI - words needing critical thinking. NYIMBO - songs with arranged melodious words. MADINKU - repetitive words with rhythmic sounds. TUSANKO - words used to curse or express distress. MANGWININI - satirical composition causing reflection.

teacher_steps: Sololela basicikolo mukupa mikozyanyo ya misyobo ya Litilicca yakumulomo
Gwasyilizya kululamika mikozyanyo yapa basicikolo
learner_steps: Basicikolo bape mikozyanyo yamisyobo ya Litilicca yakumulomo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Examples provided: TWAANO - Story of Munene Chaatila and wisdom. TUSIMPI - Proverbs like 'Ŋombe ntaanzi njiinywa meenda mabotu'. TUNYONA MULAKA - 'Lyapya payi lyapya payi'. TULABI - Riddles with answers. TUSANKO - Curses and expressions. MANGWININI - Examples of satirical works.

sub_topics.short_notes: Litilicca yakumulomo ncibeela cazyaano zyaambaulwa naa kwiimbwa. Zyaano zyikananwa zyilagwasya kuselemuna tunsiya-nsiya kuzwa kumusela omwe kusika kumusela uccilila.

questions: Basicikolo balembe twaambyo ntobazyi
Basicikolo bakalembe aumwi kaimbo akukaimba
